nasb.text: they and every beast after its kind, and all the cattle after their kind, and every creeping thing that creeps on the earth after its kind, and every bird after its kind, all sorts of birds.

esv.text: they and every beast, according to its kind, and all the livestock according to their kinds, and every creeping thing that creeps on the earth, according to its kind, and every bird, according to its kind, every winged creature.

cnv.text: 他們一家，所有走獸各從其類，所有牲畜各從其類，所有在地上爬行的動物各從其類，所有有羽有翼的飛禽各從其類，

ccb.text: 所有的野兽、牲畜、地上的爬虫和飞鸟都按种类进入方舟。

csbs.text: 与他们一起的，还有一切野兽，各从其类；一切牲畜，各从其类；在地上活动的一切动物，各从其类；一切飞禽，就是一切有翅膀的鸟类，各从其类。
